docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,858.82 FILED BY HAUCH, PIA AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAUCH, PIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC. THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF AS THE EQUIPMENT DEFENDANT INSTALLED IN PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE WAS NOT DEFECTIVE AND FUNCTIONED AS IT WAS DESIGNED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HAUCH, PIA AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-19-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GETAROUND, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF PIA HAUCH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DETAROUND, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED J. WHORLEY, HEAD OF FLEET AND AUTO TECH OPERATIONS. PLAINITFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-08-2017 - JUDGMENT.
